{{CargoRelic
|name=The Pieta
|rank=S
|affct=CIV
|birthday=01-20
|source=Fragment Crafting (18.8%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Wishing (0.69%)
|description=On Jan 20, 1499 AD, Michelangelo carved this statue for the St. Peter's Bascilla.

The Pieta is a famous statue that depicts the body of Jesus on the lap of his mother Mary after the crucifixion by the Roman governor. On the statue, a scar is seen under Jesus' ribs, and he wore a natural expression on the face. Lying on Maria's lap, his head leaned back and his bent body is as slender as a gymnast, which showed the weakness and hopelessness of death and expresses the greatness of motherly love. This artwork caused a sensation in the entire city of Rome when it was first displayed and is an iconic piece in the history of art.

[Basic info]

Material: Marble

Height: 175cm

Location: St. Peter's Bascilla, Vatican

Era: Renaissance
|fame=53
|art=52
|fth=65
|civ=99
|tech=63
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail HP +20<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +2<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail HP +40<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +4<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Per Alter God Descent, Snail HP +60<br>Per Alter God Descent, Snail ATK +6<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss4=Snail HP +500<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail HP +100<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +10<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss5=Snail HP +700<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail HP +140<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +14<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss6=Snail HP +1,000<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail HP +200<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +20<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss7=Snail HP +1,000<br>Per Alter God Descent, Snail HP +200<br>Per Alter God Descent, Snail ATK +20<br>Gods Descended: 30/30<br>Snail HP +1,000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: This Relic's CIV +15
|skill2=[[File:Quarry skill III.png|50px]]Place in Quarry: Find Ancient Fossil by +30%
|skill3=[[File:Lumbercamp skill III.png|50px]]Place in Lumber Camp: This Relic's CIV +15
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:God Descent Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Compass Boost]]
[[Category:CIV Boost]]
[[Category:Quarry Skill]]
[[Category:Ancient Fossil Boost]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Skill]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Output Boost]]
[[Category:Angel Gene Cost Reduction]]
[[Category:Rewards Divine Chests]]
